title: rhododendron cornu-bovis
intro: Rhododendron cornu-bovis, also known as the Bovis Rhododendron, is a species of rhododendron native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron cornu-bovis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. In traditional herbal medicine, the roots are often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea for medicinal use.
